message:
refactor: inline tracker adapters into internal packages

Move IssueTracker implementations from internal/tracker/adapters/{linear,gitlab}/
directly into internal/{linear,gitlab}/ and create a new minimal Jira tracker.
Each package now registers itself via init(), eliminating the adapter indirection
layer. Delete the adapters/ directory entirely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew

files.patch:
@@ -120,7 +120,7 @@ linters:
           - unparam
         text: 'truncateID.*maxLen'
       # unparam: getConfig error return kept for API consistency with store.GetConfig
-      - path: 'internal/tracker/adapters/(linear|gitlab)/adapter\.go'
+      - path: 'internal/(linear|gitlab|jira)/tracker\.go'
         linters:
           - unparam
         text: 'getConfig'
